title: Briful Hydrangea Artificial Flowers Real Touch Hydrangea Flowers 24.8" Tall Fake Flowers Hydrangea Plants with Long Stem Green Artificial Flowers Outdoor, Garden Wedding, Home Decor
features: These stunning large artificial hydrangea plants can be added to a tall vase alone or with other flowers for a vibrant and beautiful display. These fake flowers artificial hydrangeas offer a classy and elegant look for both your wedding flower bouquet and floral arrangements in home decorations.

High quality polyurethane material guarrantees the stability of vivid 3D printing color. Our real touch flowers faux hydrangeas can retain the memory of its initial shape after being subjected to external forces such as squeezing and pressing. The faux flower petals and green leaves are visible with vein-like lines.

These beautiful artificial long stem flowers are free maintenance way of bringing the exquisite splendor of nature into the interior space. You never have to worry about watering them or keeping them in sunlight.

The best part about this faux hydrangea flower is that you just need to invest once in good quality flower material and you are good to go for the next 2 to 3 years. Artificial flowers are much reasonable than fresh flowers and easy to clean as well.
Hydrangea artificial size: 24.8"/63cm Tall x 7.1"/18cm Bloom. Each artificial hydrangea flower with stem has in total 90 real touch petals and 4 large green leaves.
description: Product Description ADVANTAGES Fake hydrangea flowers will not wither and can be stored for a long time. The flower stems are easy to bend and cut to meet your various needs. USAGES The artificial hydrangea flowers are suitable for making flower bouquets, centerpiece, brides bouquet, flower arrangements, etc. They are perfect for home, wedding, party, baby shower, festival, etc decoration. DIY FLOWERS Artificial flowers and stem both could be taken apart and combined. You can be free to bend or snip the hydrangea stem to fit your vase. Silk hydrangea flowers could also be DIY with other faux flowers, make a special centerpiece flowers arrangement! Handcrafted from silk with attention to detail, our silk hydrangeas and hydrangea stems are durable replicas of their natural counterparts Needless to mention, flowers not just brighten up any décor but also have a symbolic significance in our lives. Let’s take hydrangeas for instance – while being a token of understanding between people, prosperity, and gratitude, a hydrangea flower can fascinate with its beauty even the most sophisticated beholders. Hydrangea Stems Features: Vivid real touch petals and green leaves Get fresh-flower look without the expense or the maintenance. Mimics natural growth hydrangea flowers, our artificial hydrangea petals vary in size and have different shades. Popular wedding flowers- The silk hydrangea is a four-petaled flower, perfect for adding this beautiful fullness to your wedding table as a wedding centerpiece. TIPS: To keep silk or synthetic arrangements dust-free, you can clean gently with a soft, dry cloth or use the small brush attachment of your vacuum. A blow-dryer can be used to get the dust off.
